requirements.requirement: Establish BCM programme covering trading, clearing, settlement, and custody operations
requirements.rationale: Ensures capital market operations can continue during disruptions

requirements.requirement: Ensure trading systems have redundancy and automatic failover capabilities
requirements.rationale: Maintains market access during system failures

requirements.requirement: Conduct annual DR testing including participation in industry-wide exercises
requirements.rationale: Validates recovery capabilities and industry coordination

requirements.requirement: Define alternative settlement procedures and coordination protocols with clearing and depository
requirements.rationale: Ensures settlement can continue through manual procedures if systems fail
